title: Founding Growth Lead

must_haves.req: 4+ years in a growth or commercial role at a seed-to-Series-A startup
must_haves.note: ~4.4 yrs at Minima (seed-to-Series-A) in growth/GTM/marketing — meets the years and stage, but growth was community-led, not classic B2B commercial.

must_haves.req: Build pipeline from scratch (cold outreach, events, early-stage hustle)
must_haves.note: Built community/presale funnels and events from zero (40k X, 100k Discord/Telegram, $4.5m presale); less classic B2B outbound pipeline.

must_haves.req: Daily AI usage with workflow automation (non-negotiable, assessed multiple times)
must_haves.note: Claude Code agent builder — clears the AI-fluency gate well.
Listing frames Lead as founding-team status not management hierarchy; ceiling is head-of-growth. Soft seniority gate, not a hard one.

one_line_verdict: Stage, years, AI-fluency and founder-mentality all fit; the gap is community-led vs B2B-commercial growth and a soft 'Lead' bar — plausible if he frames presale/community as pipeline-building.
fetch_note: Full JD from the live Lovable application microsite (open, actively recruiting). ivee = AI training/automation startup, Shoreditch, $1M seed (Steven Bartlett, Microsoft AI, Balderton, Dawn). Apply via short form on the site.
